items.title: What if the next few YC batches have overly correlated performance because they all use G…
items.title_zh: 如果接下来的几个 YC 批次由于都使用 G 而具有过度相关的性能怎么办？
items.description: What if the next few YC batches have overly correlated performance because they all use GStack, which causes them to make the same kinds of mistakes but also biases to them towards being selected for admission.
